headline: Prologis (PLD) Stock Looks Fully Valued With Growth Already Priced In
summary: Prologis stock has delivered a strong 38.8% return over the past year, yet both the Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) intrinsic value estimate and market multiples currently point to the shares trading at a premium rather than as a clear bargain. Over the last 12 months, Prologis is up 38.8%, which puts extra attention on whether recent gains already reflect the value of its logistics real estate portfolio. The unsolicited all stock proposal for SEGRO can support long term growth expectations if...

headline: Is Prologis (PLD) Fairly Valued Following Its Board Appointment?
summary: Why Prologis Stock Is Back in Focus After a Boardroom Change Prologis (PLD) is attracting fresh attention after appointing former Visa chief executive Alfred F. Kelly, Jr. to its board, giving investors a new governance angle to consider alongside the company’s logistics real estate profile. See our latest analysis for Prologis. Recent interest around Prologis, including the SEGRO combination talks and new institutional disclosures, comes as the stock trades at $143.61, with an 11.28% year to...
